penalties.description: Video content is instructional with no observable FLS task performance.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models identified this as instructional content rather than an actual FLS task performance. No task completion elements were visible, resulting in automatic zero score for incomplete task.

disagreements.rationale: Both models agree no task was performed, but incomplete_task is the standard FLS penalty category for non-attempts, while cannot_determine is not a recognized penalty type in the rubric.
GPT's assessment that no actual task phases were observable in instructional content is more accurate than detecting phases in demonstration footage.
